description_long: This house features a modern, boxy design with a dark gabled roof and a combination of brick and wood-textured exterior walls. The front facade includes a prominent garage, a driveway with a parked car, and a raised entryway accessed by steps, flanked by landscaped green areas. Large rectangular windows dominate both the front and rear, providing ample natural light to the interior. The side elevations reveal a stepped massing, with a mix of single and double-story sections, and a small patio or deck area at the rear. The property is set on a rectangular plot with a well-maintained lawn surrounding the structure. The overall appearance is contemporary, with clean lines and minimal decorative elements.
description: A modern two-story house with a dark gabled roof, brick and wood exterior, large windows, and a garage, set on a landscaped rectangular plot.
description_view_0: Front view showing the garage, driveway with a car, raised entry steps, and large front windows.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the gabled roof, brick wall, and the landscaped side yard.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying large windows, a small patio or deck, and the stepped massing of the house.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the garage extension, driveway, and the transition between single and double-story sections.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large rectangular windows
attribute_entryway_design: Raised entry with steps, simple door, and minimal overhang, flanked by landscaped areas
